name: Psychokinetic Burst Crystal

prerequisites.other: blast of force or concussive blast

description: Silvery-black and potent, this weapon is very smooth and difficult to grip tightly. This weapon functions as a psychokinetic weapon. In addition, the weapon releases a blast of destructive psionic energy on a successful critical hit, dealing extra force damage. Critical ×2: 1d6. ×3: 2d6. ×4: 3d6. This extra damage is not affected by damage reduction, and it affects incorporeal creatures even if the attack would normally miss due to the incorporeal miss chance. This is a continuous effect and requires no activation. Projectile weapons bestow this property upon their ammunition.
unidentifiedDesc: A silvery-black potent weapon augmentation crystal.
